[[Second Lieutenant/Legends|Second Lieutenant]] '''Momo''' was an officer of the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] assigned to [[Jerec (Inquisitor)|Jerec's]] [[Vengeance Battle Group|battle group]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
During his career Momo wanted to establish his nickname as "Mad [[Dog/Legends|Dog]] Momo", but it never caught among his companions.<ref name="JK">''[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight]]''</ref>

In [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]], he was part of the ground forces that invaded the planet. After the disappearance of [[Patrol 341]] under [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Aagon]], the young [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Yun]] was assigned to investigate, and Momo served as Yun's [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-ST]] driver. He led the Scout through a ravine up to the eastern boundary of the group's patrol area.<ref name="JK" /> 

He reported that there was no trace of any patrol, debris or [[ozone/Legends|ozone]] resulting from a [[lightfight]]; he confirmed it was correct coordinates even though it seemed like a patrol was never there. Yun inquired whether he was familiar with the [[Bouncer]]s, whom Aagon used to skin and keep in his corridor as trophy, which Momo knew, adding that it wasn't their area.<ref name="JKaudio">[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight (audio drama)|''Dark Forces: Jedi Knight'' audio drama]]</ref> Yun realised that the patrol left their area in order to go hunting, and ordered Momo to move to the smooth hardpan north where the Bouncers are found.<ref name="JK" /><ref name="JKaudio" />

Some time after the team reached a rocky area, and a [[company/Legends|company]] of Stormtroopers got out of the AT-AT and fanned out to inspect.<ref name="JK" /> Momo reported that there were [[Unidentified Ruusan temple|some ruins]] nearby but not unusual for Ruusan. Momo stood perplexed as Yun mumbled to himself and pondered the presence of Rebels through [[the Force/Legends|the Force]].<ref name="JKaudio" />
The ground pounders discovered a [[Stormtrooper_armor/Legends|helmet]] bearing the tag [[RW957]], and Momo tugged on Yun's pant leg, who was standing at the top hatch. Yun checked the name on his [[datapad/Legends|datapad]], and confirmed that the team was attacked by [[Kyle Katarn]]. Momo thought there was a chance to find the Rebels<ref name="JKaudio" /> but Yun ordered to camp for the night insted.<ref name="JK" /> Momo pointed out that there were still two [[standard hour/Legends|hours]] of daylight but Yun insisted, and Momo relayed the order to the units.<ref name="JKaudio" />

==Personality and traits==
Momo had a nice personality, young-looking face, and unlike most [[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtroopers]] he had never fired a single shot. Momo however wanted to promote a different image for himself and imagined himself as "Mad Dog", a callsign that his companions didn't find fitting to him and almost never used.<ref name="JK" />

==Behind the scenes==
Momo appeared in the novella ''[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight]]''. In the [[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight (audio drama)|audio dramatization]] there is a dialogue where Momo is involved although the character is unnamed. [[James Cada]] and [[Tom Keith]] are credited as two different "Imperial Pilots".

==Appearances==
